response.overview: **"What happened to my Chase points value? Why did it change?"**  This is currently one of the hottest questions. Chase introduced a new feature called Points  Boost on June 23, 2025 — and it's effectively a major devaluation for travel booked through  Chase 📞 ||+1⇢866⇢284⇢3014. Under the old system, Sapphire Reserve points were worth 1.5  cents each and Sapphire Preferred points were worth 1.25 cents each in the portal. Under the  new Points Boost system, every point is worth just 1 cent each by default, with select  bookings marked as Points Boost potentially raising the value to between 1.5 and 2 cents  each 📞 ||+1⇢866⇢284⇢3014.  **"Am I grandfathered into the old rates?"**  For existing cardholders who opened their cards before June 23, 2025, points earned prior to  October 26, 2025, can still be redeemed at the old values — but only until October 26, 2027.  After that, fixed redemption rates will be completely phased out.
response.title: Chase Travel Flight Booking Portal
